features.name: Cinematic Media Player & Showcase
features.description: Full-screen showcase player with autoplay, vendor info overlay, and endless loop.

features.name: Front-End Account Panel & Talent Onboarding
features.description: Front-end login/registration modal and admin-initiated talent onboarding workflow.

features.name: Frictionless Booking Modal
features.description: Single-modal booking and checkout flow with minimal buyer friction.

features.name: Dokan Category Attributes Manager
features.description: Dynamic category-specific vendor profile attributes with conditional display and filters.

features.name: Astra Child Theme (EcomCine Orchestrator)
features.description: Central controller: asset loading, Dokan/WooCommerce overrides, vendor attributes integration, social metrics.
